## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? 1-3 bullet points. -->

-

## What type of change?

- [ ] New command / skill / agent
- [ ] Update to existing command / rule / skill
- [ ] Bug fix (setup script, bridge, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Other: ___

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] Ran `make validate` — all files in place
- [ ] Ran `make lint` — no shellcheck or markdown issues
- [ ] Tested with `setup.sh --global` on clean `~/.claude/`
- [ ] Ran the affected command in Claude Code
- [ ] N/A (docs-only change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] Updated docs (README, GUIDE, CHEATSHEET) if adding/changing commands
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] CLAUDE.md stays under 200 lines of actionable content
